payload.description: Hard-replace hard-coded Bedrock Sonnet 4 and older Claude 3 Haiku model IDs in report/RCA/evaluation analysis helper paths with Claude Haiku 4.5 (us.anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0). Keep score YAML/runtime defaults and unrelated chat/optimizer defaults out of scope.
payload.title: Replace Sonnet 4 and older Haiku analysis models with Haiku 4.5
